sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this title

special_mechanics.name: Charge Attack
special_mechanics.description: Ecco's main attack is ramming into enemies at high speeds

special_mechanics.name: Sonar
special_mechanics.description: Used to communicate with other cetaceans, interact with crystal Glyphs, and use echolocation for map display. Can be combined with charge for ranged attack

special_mechanics.name: Air Requirement
special_mechanics.description: As a mammal, Ecco is required to surface for air at regular intervals

special_mechanics.name: Pulsar Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Grants ability to fire multi-directional sonar attack at enemies for stage duration

special_mechanics.name: Metasphere Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Transforms Ecco into different animals (seagull, jellyfish, shark, school of fish, Vortex drone). Transformations are level-specific

special_mechanics.name: Pseudo-3D Ring Navigation
special_mechanics.description: In certain stages, Ecco must swim through moving rings while avoiding or attacking enemies. Player forced to restart if too many rings are missed or too much damage taken

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. Game is an action-adventure with underwater swimming mechanics. No precise physics parameters have been documented in available sources. Movement is based on charging and sonar mechanics rather than traditional platformer jumping
sources_used: Wikipedia - Ecco: The Tides of Time
